title: Modern Typing, Generics, and API Evolution
description: Type-check interchangeable repositories, policies, events, and domain collections in Python 3.14. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a statically checked domain API while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use modern built-in generics, unions, Self, type parameters, and protocols.
Reason about variance and callable compatibility instead of silencing type errors.
Treat annotations as tooling contracts with runtime introspection risks.
